title: equisetum arvense f. campestre
intro: Equisetum arvense f. campestre, also known as field horsetail, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family and is commonly found in wetland areas and along streams. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Equisetum arvense f. campestre include its ability to help with urinary tract issues, joint pain, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in some modern herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
